channel.title: [Archive] Guy, Sharyn and Clint Podcast - The Edge
channel.description: Two guys, a girl and a podcast! When it comes to Guy, Sharyn and Clint you can never be sure what's going to happen next but it's likely to be very random and a lot of fun! Download now, subscribe and join their weird little family. [archive]

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Tuesday March 8th 2016
item.description: And now, a story about a man who decided to go for a walk...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday March 9th 2016
item.description: He had to walk cause his car had been towed because he left it on someones really expensive and new iPad they just got from JB HI FI...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Thursday March 10th 2016
item.description: So off our protagonist (let's call him Brian) set on his big journey down K Road when suddenly, Brian was approached by a mysterious figure...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Friday March 11th 2016
item.description: Brian couldn't quite make out who it was, for it was dark and he left his eye contact cleaning fluid at a mates house so he had to choose either running the risk of getting an eye infection or being kinda blind for the day. So, he chose the latter... BUT as the mysterious figure moved closer, he started to make out the person as... no, it couldn't possibly be...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Monday March 14th 2016
item.description: As the big, lumbering, awkward figure moved closer it became clear that it was in fact... Guy Williams! Brian was shocked. Not only because Guy was kinda tall and weird looking but he had blood dripping from his mouth, and a look in his eye that spelled only one word. CRAZY. Guy cleared his throat and bellowed out...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Tuesday March 15th 2016
item.description: "YOU! YOU'VE GOT A NICE BUTT!!!" Guy Williams screamed at Brian. His echoing voice filled the cold and dark air of K Road, his vocal sound waves exploding out in all directions, jiggling my aforementioned butt cheeks in a rippling manner. That's when Guy reached out towards me...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday March 16th 2016
Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Thursday March 17th 2016
item.description: Guy thumped Brian across the head, knocking him out instantly. Brian drifted into and out of conciseness as he was being dragged by the legs, his ankles swelling from the tight grip of a blood thirsty Guy Williams. "But why?" "Where could he possibly be taking me?" Those were Brian's final thoughts as his eyes took him back into the darkness one last time...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Friday March 18th 2016
item.description: Brian awoke, cold and confused. Everything seemed upside-down. It took a few moments for Brian to realize he actually was hanging upside down, his legs encased in the ceiling of an ice cave. It was pretty much and exact reenactment from that one seen in Star Wars, as if someone had re-purposed it for the sake of telling a story that had no clear objective or logical place to go. Brian's head hurt. But he did know one thing... whatever cave Guy Williams had brought him back to was no safe place...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Monday March 21st 2016
item.description: Brian must have been hanging upside down in that cave for hours, he had no way to keep track of the time. That's when Brian noticed that big dark figure appear again. Guy Williams had come back from what looked like a big day on the prowl, but he wasn't alone... he was dragging what seemed to be a lifeless body in with him. Guy hung them up next to Brian, he couldn't make out the other persons face as their long wavy hair was sheltering their identity. As Guy hung whoever it was upside down next to Brian, he took one long sniff of their hair, brushed their cheek and whispered "Me, love, you..."

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Tuesday March 22nd 2016
item.description: At that moment the person hanging next to Brian performed and amazing super duper scissor kick, free both of them from the deathly grasp of the hooks above, while simultaneously knocking Guy Williams back and to the ground. Brian fell flat on his head, which, by the way, is not the most ideal place you want to land when you've been hanging upside down for countless hours. The mystery person turned to Brian and said "For copyright reasons, if you want to not die and would rather be alive... come with me..."

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday March 23rd 2016
item.description: The mystery person grabbed Brian's hand and pulled him with a mighty urgency. They ran out of that ghastly Guy Williams's cave faster than a brothel runs out of clean towels. Once at a safe distance, things calmed down. Brian and the person who had saved his life slowed down, and finally, Brian got a chance to come face to face with his savior. To Brian's surprise, it was none other than the one and only...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Thursday March 24th 2016
item.description: -- The story will continue after the long weekend and when I can be bothered thinking up a new part to it --

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Tuesday March 29th 2016
item.description: My god, it was.... SHARYN CASEY?!? "But I thought you died saving all those kittens from that kitten orphanage during the great Kitten-Orphanage fire of 2016" Brian asked in an excited but rather confused tone. "Nah mate, nothing can take down that dawg" Sharyn exclaimed, referencing her street name, Shaz Dawg. Some even saw her as a super hero, a calling card that criminals would fear to speak of for decades. Yet, here she was, rescuing Brian.... but why?

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday March 30th 2016
item.description: "How did you become captured by Guy Williams" asked Brian, to which Shaz Dawg replied "Hahahaha, you f#&%ing IDIOT!" Brian, was shocked, but he also remembered Shaz Dawg liked to swear as much as she liked to fight crime, which was a lot. "I wouldn't let that c#$% catch me! I did it on purpose motha f&@#er!" Brian was quiet, even though he knew Shaz Dawg was contradicting herself in that very sentence, as for Shaz Dawg to be "caught" on purpose, she would have to of LET Guy Williams "catch" her, he decided not bring that information to light... "But why? Let him catch you" He asked...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Thursday March 31st 2016
item.description: "Because" Shaz Dawg began to explain... "You are more important than you realize Brian, you are someone no one else in this journey can be... you dumb piece of $t" Brian was lost, confused, dumbfounded. "How... how do you know who I am? WHAT'S GOING ON?!" What Shaz Dawg then revealed to Brian, was about to change the course of his life... forever...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Friday April 1st 2016
item.description: --The story will continue once again, after the weekend--

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Monday April 4th 2016
item.description: "You Brian, you silly f&$%^er you... you are the PROTAGONIST!" Shaz Dawg explained... "This isn't real! None of it f#%@ing is! YOUR LIFE HAS BEEN ONE STORY BROKEN UP INTO LITTLE SEGMENTS AND PLACED INTO THE BIO OF AN OBSCURE NZ PODCAST!" Brian was shocked, unable to speak, he had no idea what Shaz Dawg was saying...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Tuesday April 5th 2016
item.description: "Are you okay Shaz Dawg?" Brian replied... "OKAY!?! I'M MOTHER F*$^%IN GREAT!" Yelled Shaz Dawg at an alarmingly loud volume. "I Finally know the truth about our world, and so do you, we are trapped in a stupid f&^$ing podcast bio and we are gonna break out!" Brian world was spinning around him, he was having a hard time believing what was coming out of Shaz Dawgs potty mouth...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday April 6th 2016
item.description: "I can't f$#^ing explain anymore right now, we gotta go find someone else, the only person who knows what the f%#$ to do" Shaz Dawg explained to Brian, who was still very overwhelmed by the situation. "Only you as the protagonist can get us out of this shitty podcast bio story" Shaz Dawg said. "But who else do we need?" Asked Brian...

item.description: "Urgughgghhhh" was the next thing that followed Brian's question... but not from Brian nor Shaz Dawg, but GUY WILLIAMS! He was back, and hot on his heels chasing down the two who had escaped from his herpes cave earlier. "F$%K! RUN!" Shouted Shaz Dawg. The pair quickly got into the 'Dawg Mobile' which was there for some reason and speed off into the sunset. Guy came to the tire marks and with his super tracking abilities began to follow them on their path...

item.description: "Think you should slow down a bit?" Brian quietly asked Shaz Dawg "F#^%K NO!?" She replied. "We need to find the one man who can help us break out of this stupid as F%$k podcast bio" she continued. "Who is he?" Brian asked. "He is an urban legend, a man only to be found at high intensity raves and also sometimes Homegrown, you punk b^%#h" Shaz Dawg replied. "So where are we going now then?" Brian asked "We're going to.... Ibiza mother f&%er"...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Wednesday April 13th 2016
item.description: At that moment the Shaz mobile took flight and soared off into the twilight sky. Brian was surprised. He had only been in a flying car once before, but that's a story for another time. The car came down to a crowed of 3 - 7 people raving in a large open field with one man at the controls of what seemed to be a rather pricey bit of DJ equipment. It was then that Brian knew exactly who they were looking for...

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Thursday April 14th 2016
item.description: As the Shaz Dawg Mobile lowered itself closer to the ground in Ibiza, it became clear who was at the controls of a 4 - 7 person rave... it was Emergency DJ Clint! "I thought he only DJ'd if it was an emergency?" asked Brian. "He does, but in this world, everything is a mother f^%#kin emergency, so he is always DJing" replied Shaz Dawg. DJ Clint looked up and saw the Shaz Dawg mobile and without hesitation grabbed is sick AF CDJ's and bolted through the crowed of which, if I haven't already mentioned, was about 2 - 4 people max...

item.title: 🚨🚨🚨 GSC EMERGENCY BROADCAST For Friday April 15th, 2016 🚨🚨🚨 [UNOFFICIAL]
item.description: 🚨🚨🚨 An emergency broadcast during the Workdays of Awesome show. 🚨🚨🚨 [UNOFFICIAL]

item.title: Guy, Sharyn and Clint's Podcast For Friday April 15th 2016
item.description: "Why is he running?" Brian asked. "Cause he's a f%$in PUSSY MATE!" Yelled Shaz Dawg. They took pursuit, though, Emergency DJ Clint was a slippery man. He could weave in and out of big crowds... even that crowd of like 2 people he was DJing to. As the Shaz Dawg mobile got closer to him, he turned around, jumped in the air, pulled out a CDJ and did a devastating 'wicky wicky' sending destructive sound-waves through the air, causing the Shaz Dawg mobile to come crashing down...
